title: Backpack Bundles!
description: A resource pack that replaces bundle texture to look like a backpack. Now comes with custom sounds (optional) and dyeing support.
body:
This resource pack replaces the bundle textures to make it look like a backpack. 

Both Legacy and Modern versions come with new custom sounds (optional) as well as lang files for 6 languages (US English, UK English, Polish, German, Russian and French)

Dye support in Modern Edition (1.21.2 or higher)
Legacy Edition comes with textures for both empty and filled states (1.21.1 or lower)

For Legacy Edition i recommend using a mod/datapack that make bundles acquirable in survival with my personal favorite mod being [Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)
